runtime_root_policy: absolute external path outside the source checkout; must not exist before materialization

control.source_policy: copy only the Original RecClaw runtime allowlist; omit src/recclaw_core, Guard contracts, overlays, and Guard environment variables

treatment.source_policy: copy the same Original RecClaw runtime allowlist, apply phase1/overlays/treatment_agent.patch, and add only the hash-bound frozen Guard integration

paired_llm_broker.identical_request_policy: same pair sequence and canonical request digest replays one exact provider response
paired_llm_broker.divergent_request_policy: call upstream separately and record the divergence rather than pretending prompts were matched
